posts.author: ECH (Emmanuel CHERIGIE)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday community!

I have 2 questions related to workflows.

  1. Is it possible to redirect a branch to another to avoid the need to create several instance of the same action? See below what I mean:

    image981×897 82.8 KB

  2. Is it possible to move an action within the workflow (if not at the right place) instead of remove and create it again?

Thanks in advance for your support/advices!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: At this point, no. You’ll need to delete and create it again. Hopefully down the road!

posts.author: ECH (Emmanuel CHERIGIE)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Desiree. I understand your answer is related to my 2nd question. What about the 1st one? I think you will provide me a similar answer as "not yet ", isn’t it? ^^
